description: A simple hello-world workflow that greets by name.
detailedDescription: Accepts an optional `name` input and returns a greeting message with a timestamp. Useful for testing the CREHub gateway and CRE simulate pipeline end-to-end.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description: The name to greet. Defaults to 'World' if omitted.

outputs.name: timestamp
outputs.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the greeting was generated.
